name: vibe-fix-bug
description: Full spec-driven workflow for diagnosing and fixing a bug with an AI coding agent. Triggers on "bug:" prefix, "I have a bug", "something is broken", "this is not working", "fix this issue", "there is a bug in", "debug this", "broken", "issue". Always use when the user reports unexpected behaviour — even without the exact prefix. Three-way severity triage: trivial bugs (3 tasks, no folder), environment bugs (runs vibe-doctor first, no BUG_SPEC), significant bugs (full workflow). Environment bugs — HMR loops, missing deps, config mismatches, build tool failures — are detected at triage and routed to vibe-doctor rather than full bug workflow. Diagnosis always before the fix. Regression test always before fix code. BUG_SPEC.md, BUG_PLAN.md, BUG_TASKS.md created for significant bugs only.
